sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74892" key="o)rewkome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρεω-κομέω</orth>, <sense id="n74892.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀρεωπολέω</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:183" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.183</biblScope> </bibl> (written <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀρεο-</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
